final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial illustration of a warm family reunion dinner scene.

Style/medium: needs a "温馨" and "烟火气" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 1980s-90s Chinese New Year poster tradition, 老上海月份牌 commercial illustration, contemporary 新中式 lifestyle photography; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a Chinese round table with hot pot steaming, a family raising glasses and smiling together
Scene/backdrop: must include walls covered with photos, warm domestic interior setting
Lighting/mood: needs a warm yellow light atmosphere with cozy, happy mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm yellow direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve the hot pot steam, photo-covered walls, and family toast moment
Avoid:
